_comment: Canonical ministry data for the capture-and-curate system. Molds: A = person/couple with a few prayer points; B = org with named missionaries, one sub-point per person; C = org prayed for as a body. display_default seeds each captured request's display flag (for the future hallway display); 'private' is never shown on a public screen. This file is the editable encourager map the Phase 6 website will surface.

midwest_indian_mission.name: Don & Teleka Dewing
midwest_indian_mission.shape: The couple is the prayer subject. Compress the sub-ministries (chapels, youth, shelter, food pantry) into context - never one bullet per sub-ministry.

living_stones.name: Dr. Pat
living_stones.shape: Individual missionary. Requests often concern persecuted believers - keep names/pseudonyms exactly as given, never add identifying detail.

fort_wilderness.name: Fort Wilderness
fort_wilderness.shape: Org with named missionaries prayed for one by one: Jonathan & Dyane Brood, Steve & Lisa Siefert, Katie Kusilek, Janet Merkel, Torgerson. One sub-point per person/couple with a current request.

occ.name: Operation Christmas Child
occ.shape: Org prayed for as a body. Kathy typically submits a monthly .docx attachment (e.g. 'June OCC Prayers').

rock_international.name: Dennis & Linda Schermer
rock_international.shape: Couple. Dennis covers this ministry directly; the Schermers reply to his check-in emails themselves.

wild.name: WILD
wild.shape: Org prayed for as a body. Material arrives as WILD newsletter/prayer emails forwarded by Dennis (subject like 'WILD Prayer ...').

life_source.name: Life Source Ministries
life_source.shape: Org prayed for as a body. Sends monthly prayer lists, sometimes as .docx attachments.
